Video.summary: Live from the NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025, this pivotal collegiate team match features Kennesaw State (KSU) facing off against Virginia Tech. The action kicks off with a mixed doubles showdown chosen by coin-toss winner Virginia Tech.Watch as Virginia Tech's Cody Miller and Heather Murphy bring their A-game against KSU's Yuri Yadi and Sophia Fiona. The match also features men's doubles with Kellen Funk and Cody Miller representing the Hokies, while Parth Modi and his partner fight to keep KSU's hopes alive. With crucial seeding for bracket play on the line, both teams battle through intense rallies and strategic plays in this pool play matchup.
Video.title: NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Kennesaw State vs. Virginia Tech

Image.alt: NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Kennesaw State vs. Virginia Tech
NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Kennesaw State vs. Virginia Tech
NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Kennesaw State vs. Virginia Tech

Video.summary: Watch as the formidable mother-daughter duo, Lee and Anna Leigh Waters, take on challengers from North Carolina in this Pro Women's Doubles match from the US National Pickleball Center. After an injury, it is great to see the champions partner up again, demonstrating the "fire and ice" style of play that has made them national champions. While the Waters team's game one was a quick 11-point victory, the challengers, Fuzesi and Maloof, handled themselves well on the championship court. The players at home can learn from Anna Leigh's "instigator" shots and two-handed backhand rolls, which she helped bring to the big stage.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Pro Women's Doubles - Waters/Waters vs. Fuzesi/Maalouf

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Pro Women's Doubles - Waters/Waters vs. Fuzesi/Maalouf
US Open 2025 - Pro Women's Doubles - Waters/Waters vs. Fuzesi/Maalouf
US Open 2025 - Pro Women's Doubles - Waters/Waters vs. Fuzesi/Maalouf

Video.summary: Marcello Jardim and Marco Osorio go head-to-head in the Gold Medal Match of the 2024 US Open Pickleball Championships. With power, precision, and nonstop intensity, this Men’s Pro Singles final showcases top-tier talent and a dramatic battle for the championship title.
Video.title: US Open 2024 – Men’s Senior Pro Singles Gold Medal Match – Jardim vs Osorio

Image.alt: US Open 2024 – Men’s Senior Pro Singles Gold Medal Match – Jardim vs Osorio
US Open 2024 – Men’s Senior Pro Singles Gold Medal Match – Jardim vs Osorio
US Open 2024 – Men’s Senior Pro Singles Gold Medal Match – Jardim vs Osorio

Video.summary: April 28, 2019 - May 4, 2019 at the East Naples Community Park in Naples, Florida
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2019 - Men's Pro Doubles - Gold

Image.alt: US Open Pickleball Championships 2019 - Men's Pro Doubles - Gold
US Open Pickleball Championships 2019 - Men's Pro Doubles - Gold
US Open Pickleball Championships 2019 - Men's Pro Doubles - Gold

Video.summary: Experience the electric atmosphere of the World Pickleball League (WPBL) Season 2 as the Mumbai Pickle Power face off against the Bengaluru Jawans in a high-stakes Tie 9. With Mumbai hunting for their first outright victory and Bengaluru desperate to bounce back from a recent loss, the pressure at the Jio World Garden is at an all-time high. Watch as elite players like the "unstoppable" Katrina Stewart dominate the court in singles, while Brandon Lane and Glaura Carvajal Lane attempt to turn the tide for Mumbai in a masterclass of tactical doubles. This tie features the league’s most innovative strategies, from high-risk Pickle Plays to the pursuit of the prestigious Band of Honor, ensuring every rally is a battle for survival on the road to the semi-finals.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Mumbai vs Bengaluru - Day 5 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Mumbai vs Bengaluru - Day 5 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Mumbai vs Bengaluru - Day 5 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Mumbai vs Bengaluru - Day 5 Tie 1

Video.summary: Filmed at the US Open Pickleball Championships in Naples, Florida, this Pro Women’s Doubles matchup features the powerhouse mother-daughter team Leigh and Anna Leigh Waters, known for their aggressive tactics and flawless communication. They square off against promising challengers Alexa Schull and Ava Cavataio, who bring fearless shot-making and tight teamwork to the court. From baseline drives to net duels, this clash of generations delivers fast-paced action, strategic rallies, and plenty of highlight-worthy moments.
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2025 – Pro Women’s Doubles – Waters & Waters vs Schull & Cavataio

Image.alt: US Open Pickleball Championships 2025 – Pro Women’s Doubles – Waters & Waters vs Schull & Cavataio
US Open Pickleball Championships 2025 – Pro Women’s Doubles – Waters & Waters vs Schull & Cavataio
US Open Pickleball Championships 2025 – Pro Women’s Doubles – Waters & Waters vs Schull & Cavataio

Video.summary: Catch the exhilarating Men's Pro Doubles match from the 2025 Minto US Open Pickleball Championships, powered by Margaritaville! Witness incredible action on the Zing Zang Championship Court in Naples, Florida, the paradise coast for pickleball. This thrilling match features the dynamic duo of John Cangelosi and Michael Leonard against their formidable opponents. Get ready for intense rallies, powerful shots, and strategic play from top professional pickleball players. Don't miss this must-watch event from the epicenter of pickleball!
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Mens Pro Double - Cangelosi/Leonard vs. Tomassi/Gancuart

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Mens Pro Double - Cangelosi/Leonard vs. Tomassi/Gancuart
US Open 2025 - Mens Pro Double - Cangelosi/Leonard vs. Tomassi/Gancuart
US Open 2025 - Mens Pro Double - Cangelosi/Leonard vs. Tomassi/Gancuart

Video.summary: Parris Todd and Simone Jardim compete with Bobbi Oshiro and Megan Fudge for gold in this Gold Medal Match.
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Women's Pro Doubles - Gold Medal

US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Women's Pro Doubles - Gold Medal

Video.summary: Parris Todd and Judit Castillo Gargallo face off in the 2023 US Open Women’s Pro Singles Gold Medal Match. A high-stakes showdown of rising stars, intense rallies, and top-tier shotmaking.
Video.title: US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Singles Gold Medal – Parris Todd vs Judit Castillo Gargallo

Image.alt: US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Singles Gold Medal – Parris Todd vs Judit Castillo Gargallo

Video.summary: At the 2023 US Open Pickleball Championships in Naples, Florida, Tina Pisnik and Tammy Emmrich square off against Alix Truong and Milan Rane in the Women’s Pro Doubles Bronze Medal match. Expect aggressive shot-making, quick court coverage, and intense chemistry on both sides as these athletes leave it all on the court.
Video.title: US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Doubles Bronze Medal – Truong & Rane vs Pisnik & Emmrich

Image.alt: US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Doubles Bronze Medal – Truong & Rane vs Pisnik & Emmrich
US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Doubles Bronze Medal – Truong & Rane vs Pisnik & Emmrich
US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Doubles Bronze Medal – Truong & Rane vs Pisnik & Emmrich

Video.summary: Watch a masterclass in senior pro pickleball as Peter Prodanov and Scott Moore take on Scott Crandall and Jose Derisi. With explosive hands, strategic play, and experience driving every point, this US Open quarterfinal is a showcase of skill, grit, and high-level doubles tactics.
Video.title: US Open 2023 – Men’s Senior Pro Doubles Quarterfinal – Prodanov & Moore vs Crandall & Derisi

Image.alt: US Open 2023 – Men’s Senior Pro Doubles Quarterfinal – Prodanov & Moore vs Crandall & Derisi
US Open 2023 – Men’s Senior Pro Doubles Quarterfinal – Prodanov & Moore vs Crandall & Derisi
US Open 2023 – Men’s Senior Pro Doubles Quarterfinal – Prodanov & Moore vs Crandall & Derisi

Video.summary: Dave Weinbach and Mari Humberg take on Christine Karges and Eric Oncins in this Mixed Pro Split Age Bronze Medal Match.
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Mixed Pro Split Age - Bronze Medal Match

US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Mixed Pro Split Age - Bronze Medal Match
US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Mixed Pro Split Age - Bronze Medal Match

Video.summary: In this alternate cut of the Women’s Split Pro Doubles Quarterfinal at the 2024 US Open, Suzanne Leblang & Milan Rane face off against Martina Frantova & Christine Karges in a battle of shot placement, net pressure, and quick resets. Filmed in Naples, Florida, this matchup delivers a new perspective on one of the tournament’s most tactical and fast-paced doubles clashes.
Video.title: US Open Pickleball 2024 – Women’s Split Pro Doubles Quarterfinal – Leblang & Rane vs Frantova & Karg

Image.alt: US Open Pickleball 2024 – Women’s Split Pro Doubles Quarterfinal – Leblang & Rane vs Frantova & Karg
US Open Pickleball 2024 – Women’s Split Pro Doubles Quarterfinal – Leblang & Rane vs Frantova & Karg
US Open Pickleball 2024 – Women’s Split Pro Doubles Quarterfinal – Leblang & Rane vs Frantova & Karg

Video.title: NPL - JBB United vs Picklers (Womens)

NPL - JBB United vs Picklers (Womens)
NPL - JBB United vs Picklers (Womens)

Video.summary: Experience the exciting Women's Doubles Open 4.5+ Final from the 2023 English Open held at Bolton Arena, Greater Manchester. This match features dynamic teams: Megan Fudge and Susannah Barr face off against Lee Whitwell and Riley Bohnert in a highly competitive final. Follow expert commentary highlighting key plays including Susannah Barr’s precise lobs, Megan Fudge’s powerful forehand, and strategic teamwork. See how the match unfolds in a best-of-three games format with a hard stop on time. This showcase of top-level English pickleball captures the skill, tactics, and intensity of the sport. Stay tuned for post-match insights and upcoming mixed doubles action.
Video.title: English Open 2023 – Women’s Doubles 4.5+ Final – Fudge & Barr vs Whitwell & Bohnert

Image.alt: English Open 2023 – Women’s Doubles 4.5+ Final – Fudge & Barr vs Whitwell & Bohnert
English Open 2023 – Women’s Doubles 4.5+ Final – Fudge & Barr vs Whitwell & Bohnert
English Open 2023 – Women’s Doubles 4.5+ Final – Fudge & Barr vs Whitwell & Bohnert

Video.summary: Welcome back to the 2025 Minto US Open Pickleball Championships for the Men's Pro Doubles semifinal match. This is a great representation of the sport's global growth, with the top-ranked player from India competing. The match features teams Munro and Yang against Bhatia and Mehta. The match is tightly contested, with the level of play stepping up as they enter the semi-finals. The caption file also notes that Bhatia's grandfather was a world-renowned cricketer in India with the nickname "the Sultan of Swing," which is comparable to an NFL star like Tom Brady.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Men's Pro Doubles - Munro/Yang vs. Bhatia/Mehta

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Men's Pro Doubles - Munro/Yang vs. Bhatia/Mehta
US Open 2025 - Men's Pro Doubles - Munro/Yang vs. Bhatia/Mehta
US Open 2025 - Men's Pro Doubles - Munro/Yang vs. Bhatia/Mehta

Video.summary: In this Pro Men's Doubles match from the 2025 Minto U.S. Open Pickleball Championships in Naples, Florida, the team of Yates and Sobex faces off against Yu and Zwiren. The match is characterized by powerful shots, strategic dinks, and a high-energy atmosphere on the custom-designed Championship court. Commentary highlights the players' transition from singles to doubles and features details about one of the players, Thomas Yu, who previously played tennis at Johns Hopkins University.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Pro Men's Doubles - Yates/Sobex vs. Yu/Zwiren

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Pro Men's Doubles - Yates/Sobex vs. Yu/Zwiren
US Open 2025 - Pro Men's Doubles - Yates/Sobex vs. Yu/Zwiren
US Open 2025 - Pro Men's Doubles - Yates/Sobex vs. Yu/Zwiren
